_meta: Marina English strings. Keys follow dot.path naming, roughly aligned with src/renderer/components. Missing translations fall back to the key literal so dev-mode reveals gaps.
sidebar.addBookmark.title: Pick a folder to add to bookmarks
sidebar.addTemporary.title: Pick a folder and open a temporary terminal
settings.title: Settings
settings.appearance.theme.label: Theme
settings.appearance.theme.hint: Applies to all windows immediately; xterm colors stay in sync
settings.appearance.language.label: Language
settings.appearance.windowStyle.label: Window style
settings.appearance.windowStyle.hint: Title bar layout and control button position (does not affect theme colors)
settings.appearance.macOSHover.label: Traffic light hover symbols
settings.appearance.macOSHover.hint: On macOS style, whether to show ×/−/+ on hover. Off by default (more restrained).
settings.data.dir.label: Data directory
settings.data.dir.hint: Where all Marina config files are stored
settings.ai.title: AI Assistant
settings.ai.intro: Marina's first LLM integration. Currently used only for BETA-006: an active→idle LLM recheck so long-output tools like Vite are not mis-classified as idle. All API calls go through the main process; keys are never exposed to the renderer.
settings.ai.provider.label: Provider
settings.ai.provider.hint: Other fields activate once a provider is selected
settings.ai.apiKey.label: API key
settings.ai.apiKey.hint: Stored in local settings.json; included in export
settings.ai.model.label: Model
settings.ai.model.hint: Leave blank to use the default (haiku / gpt-4o-mini)
settings.ai.test.label: Test connection
settings.ai.test.hint: Sends a minimal ping request to verify the key
settings.ai.statusRecheck.label: Status recheck (BETA-006)
settings.ai.statusRecheck.hint: LLM rechecks before active→idle; falls back to the threshold on failure, never blocks
settings.ai.statusRecheckSource.label: Recheck input source
settings.ai.statusRecheckSource.hint: raw = raw PTY bytes (ANSI escapes included); headless = pre-rendered character matrix (recommended, no redraw residue)
toast.win11MenuUpdated: Right-click menu updated. Restart your computer to ensure changes take effect.
modal.multilinePaste.title: Multi-line paste confirmation
modal.multilinePaste.message:
About to paste {count} lines.
Multi-line content may be executed as separate commands.
Enable bracketed paste in Settings → Behavior to keep the paste literal.
